examples: The technologist will guide the patient to this modified state—an imaginary world that will disassociate itself more and more from the procedure that follows.
I intend to disassociate from all related disease machinery.
Accountants should also disassociate themselves from any attempts to disclose misleading information.
Officially, Lebanon's government and Hezbollah's policy has been to "disassociate" the country from the Syrian conflict.
Peres also tried to convince the Reagan administration to disassociate with Shamir and deal only with him.
